active.text: STYLE LOCK: live-action 1840s gothic chamber drama; candlelit and lantern-lit interiors; desaturated earth tones, pale skin, dark wood, heavy period fabrics; photoreal period costume film, consistent faces and wardrobe across all scenes.

PERFORMANCE LOCK: first-person confessional adaptation; the Narrator often faces and addresses the implied listener/camera when on screen, calm then fracturing into panic; other characters are observed within the scene and look at each other or the Narrator, not the viewer; objective staging for the Old Man asleep and the Officers' inquiry.
